roles.name: Oracle of Delphi
roles.description: Reads the entrails of the requirements and divines the over-arching Salesforce solution.

roles.name: Strategos of the Phalanx
roles.description: Marshals hoplites of delivery, holds the timeline, and answers to the council of gods.

roles.name: Keeper of the Sacred Scrolls
roles.description: Steward of records, layouts, fields and permission sets in the temple archives.

roles.name: Smith of Hephaestus's Forge
roles.description: Hammers Apex, LWC, and platform features at the volcanic anvil beneath Mount Etna.

roles.name: Master Smith of the Aegis
roles.description: Forges the most enchanted artifacts — senior platform engineering and complex Apex craft.

roles.name: Archon of the Western Polis
roles.description: Captain over all Salesforce craft in the western colonies — sets standards and guides the senior smiths.

roles.name: Hoplite Captain of Sparta
roles.description: Patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced craft and a long spear.

roles.name: Peltast of the Aegean
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the realm under the Hoplite Captain's eye.

roles.name: Apprentice of the Stoa
roles.description: Learns the craft at the painted porch — shadows the seniors, configures small things, asks many questions.

roles.name: Master Bridge-builder of Corinth
roles.description: Architect of the great isthmus spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond.

roles.name: Bridge-builder of Corinth
roles.description: Lays the stones of API, middleware, and event flows under the Master Bridge-builder's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Stonecutter
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the mason's patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Healer of the Asclepion
roles.description: Tends the wounded build in the temple of healing — finds maladies before they reach the agora.

roles.name: Herald of Hermes
roles.description: Wing-footed messenger who lifts the banner for product and message — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Muse of the Agora
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — invokes the nine muses to inspire, gather, and convert.

roles.name: Bard of the Amphitheatre
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily recital.

roles.name: Scribe of the Lyceum
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal Customer and the philosophers of design.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

workstreams.name: Testing at the Gates of Hades

olympian-gods.name: Convene the Council
olympian-gods.description: Discovery sign-off — the Twelve Olympians convene at the great hall.

olympian-gods.name: Forge the Thunderbolts
olympian-gods.description: Build kickoff: Hephaestus and the Cyclopes ignite the forge.

olympian-gods.name: Audience at the High Throne
olympian-gods.description: Mid-project gate: solution review with Zeus on the marble throne.

olympian-gods.name: Hecatomb at the Altar
olympian-gods.description: Phase invoice trigger: hundred oxen sacrificed to mark the milestone.

olympian-gods.name: Coronation of the Pantheon
olympian-gods.description: Go-Live: the gods take their thrones; the platform is live across Olympus.

olympian-gods.name: Olympian Hand-off
olympian-gods.description: Hyper-care close: stewardship passed to Hera's chamberlains.

underworld-and-titans.name: Crossing the Styx
underworld-and-titans.description: Project kickoff: Charon ferries the team across to begin.

underworld-and-titans.name: Open the Gates of Hades
underworld-and-titans.description: Build phase: Cerberus admits the engineers to the deep archive.

underworld-and-titans.name: Judgement at the Asphodel
underworld-and-titans.description: UAT gate: Minos, Rhadamanthus, and Aeacus weigh the build.

underworld-and-titans.name: Tartarus Vault Sealed
underworld-and-titans.description: Go-Live: the Titan ledger is locked behind adamantine doors.

underworld-and-titans.name: Persephone Returns
underworld-and-titans.description: Hyper-care close: spring returns; handoff complete.

underworld-and-titans.name: Hades' Final Toll
underworld-and-titans.description: Final invoice: payment due to the Lord of the Dead.

heroes-and-demigods.name: Receive the Prophecy
heroes-and-demigods.description: Discovery: the oracle delivers the quest charter.

heroes-and-demigods.name: Launch of the Argo
heroes-and-demigods.description: Build: the great ship is launched; the Argonauts set sail.

heroes-and-demigods.name: Trial of the Twelve Labours
heroes-and-demigods.description: Solution review: each labour signed off by Eurystheus.

heroes-and-demigods.name: Capture the Golden Fleece
heroes-and-demigods.description: Go-Live: the prize is won and brought home in triumph.

heroes-and-demigods.name: Triumph at Olympia
heroes-and-demigods.description: Hyper-care close: laurels awarded; heroes dispersed.

heroes-and-demigods.name: Hero's Bounty Paid
heroes-and-demigods.description: Final invoice: gold and glory disbursed by the king.

monsters-and-nymphs.name: Council on Aeaea
monsters-and-nymphs.description: Kickoff council in Circe's marble hall.

monsters-and-nymphs.name: Tame the Hydra
monsters-and-nymphs.description: Discovery: many-headed sources mapped and contained.

monsters-and-nymphs.name: Weave the Nymph Wards
monsters-and-nymphs.description: Build: protective spells laid across grove and grotto.

monsters-and-nymphs.name: Solve the Sphinx's Riddle
monsters-and-nymphs.description: UAT acceptance: the Sphinx grants passage to the next phase.

monsters-and-nymphs.name: Calypso Releases the Wanderer
monsters-and-nymphs.description: Go-Live + handoff: the system sails for home.

monsters-and-nymphs.name: Tribute to the Wilds
monsters-and-nymphs.description: Final invoice from the keepers of the sanctuary.

Zeus.notes: Dalliance with a mortal — discreet earthly visit.

Artemis.notes: Moonlit hunt with the nymphs of Arcadia.

Hades.notes: Annual leave — rare visit to the surface.

Persephone.notes: Six months above with Demeter — seasonal.

Heracles.notes: Recovering from the Nemean Lion encounter.

Odysseus.notes: Detour to Ithaca — Penelope and Telemachus.

Pan.notes: Midday nap in the Arcadian woods — sacred.

Chiron.notes: Tutoring young heroes on Mount Pelion.
